examples.title: Pseudocode: Recursive Descent Parser
examples.description: Basic algorithm for a recursive descent parser
examples.code:
ALGORITHM parseX()
INPUT: tokens
OUTPUT: parse tree

BEGIN
 examine lookahead token
 choose production for X based on lookahead
 for each symbol in chosen production:
 if terminal:
 match and consume token
 if non-terminal:
 recursive call to corresponding parse function
 return success
END
examples.explanation: Step-by-step explanation of the recursive descent parsing algorithm
